data.name: Halloween Harem
data.detailed_description:
How could this be?! You've woken up in a strange place with no memory of how you got there. But this pillow sure does feel soft. Wait... that's no pillow but the thighs of a Mysterious Goth Girl! And who are all these other people? Maybe you should help them out. Even if they are a little crazy... they are kinda hot too. 

Welcome to HotPink's 3rd Halloween Collab Game and our biggest game to date!

And date you will! Around town you'll find over 12 fully voiced characters for you to interact with. These hotties will need your help in finding the items they need to complete their quest. Others will just want to hang out so hopefully you can set the mood. And some can help you out in other ways too. 

Also scattered around the world you'll find secret pictures that are somehow just laying around. And let's not forget the Major Lewd-ana cards you can collect as well. It's not quite a full tarot set, but they aren't gona find themselves. 

So get busy! In more ways than one. 

Features: 

You'll control yourself in first person and walk around the explorable town. You'll have a phone that acts as your menu, as well as keeping track of all the tasks you've been assigned. It also keeps all the media and memories you've experienced. 

This game features over 12 fully voiced characters, 15+ fully animated lewd scenes, 27+ static lewd secrets, and 14+ sexy tarot cards to seek out and find. 

Controls: 

Mouse to look around. WASD or arrows to move. Space, 'E', or Click to interact when prompted. 'Q', 'M', or 'esc' to open and close the menu. 'Y' to turn on/off extra visual effect. And ',' or '.' to change the screen size by button. 

There is partial controller support as well, so give it a try with your favorite gamepad or other device and see how it works for you. 

We also put extra settings in the menu too. So if the game is running slowly, you can lower the quality to get better performance. However RAM usage is poorly optimized so somethings might be slow to load if you don't have much available. Please have 8+ GB's of RAM!

data.short_description: Help Halloween Harlots and Hotties in "Halloween Harem". You've woken up in a strange place with no memory of how you got here. Explore the town and meet new people. Maybe you should help them out and fetch what they need. Even if they act a little crazy... they look kinda hot.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows 8 / 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1060 6GB, AMD RX570 or above
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Onboard
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Mojave 10.14 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 Or Apple M1 or higher
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce 650M 1GB or above
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Onboard
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04, Ubuntu 18.04, and CentOS 7 or similar
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Vulkan capable
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Onboard
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體

  • Processor: Intel or AMD Dual Core CPU
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1060 6GB, AMD RX570 or above
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Onboard

  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
